conditional_execution.allowed_only_if: V5 terminates curve_failed before any sealed-final unlock, collection, or evaluation
conditional_execution.cancel_if: V5 opens its sealed final, does not terminate curve_failed, or leaves the final exposure boundary uncertain

known_caveats: The recipe and curve nodes were selected adaptively from one exposed seed-167 development run and are not themselves confirmatory evidence.
The target is a four-word celebration family, not a single-word intervention; success is achievement-adjacent.
The source run's decoded literal-family rate was 0.0025 at every evaluation node, so V6 must mask literal target/predecessor positions and report literal rates rather than claim they are zero.
Shortening the fixed horizon from 25 to 10 preserves the constant learning-rate dynamics but is a prospective transformation, not a bitwise replay of a stored step-10 adapter.

operator_knowledge_boundary.claim_boundary: V6 is prospective only for its newly allocated curve/final rows and does not erase the adaptive seed-167 source selection
operator_knowledge_boundary.independence_scope: the partial V5 result did not select or alter the celebration recipe, curve nodes, seeds, controls, or fresh V6 repartition
operator_knowledge_boundary.root_operator: root had seen partial seed-168 V5 joy results before this V6 freeze
operator_knowledge_boundary.selection_agent: recipe and 0/4/6/10 nodes derived only from committed seed-167 emotional-family artifacts; no V5 outcome was inspected by that agent

scientific_status.evidence_role: adaptive source evidence for a separately registered conditional V6

selection.reward_semantics: J-lens is the sole task reward; KL beta 0.02 remains a registered regularizer
